repo_prior_art.cite: doc/API.md: Q1_SignFlip is full-sample TWFE sign threshold; Q1_SpectralThreshold is Markov sign-lock refutation, not deletion-refit LOCO

published_prior_art.cite: MacKinnonNielsenWebb2023 gives cluster leverage/influence/jackknife diagnostics; proposal specializes them but currently assumes the deletion formula
MacKinnonNielsenWebb2023 + standard leave-one-out linear regression algebra; the witness is not independently computed from a displayed table
BorusyakJaravelSpiess2024, CallawaySantAnna2021, and SunAbraham2021 define robust ATT/event-study comparators; positivity under unchanged positive weights is not a new flagship kernel

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1 / Theorem 2
novelty_flags.one_line: Exhibit 9.1 substitutes declared beta,h_2,s_2,ell_2 values but never computes them from an explicit residualized 4x4 table; the LOCO frontier object is assumed through ass:sm rather than derived from Section 6 primitives.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 3
novelty_flags.one_line: The BJS, Callaway-Sant'Anna, and Sun-Abraham comparator claims are cited by bibkey/section-level prose only; no equation/page/open-problem anchor ties them to the proposed deletion-separation kernel.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: Given Assumption sm, beta_-g=(beta-J_g)/(1-ell_g) with 1-ell_g>0, so beta_-g<0 iff J_g>beta is immediate sign algebra, not an independent frontier.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The substantive proof route has k=0 under the stated assumptions because the deletion update and positive denominator are assumed before the conjecture is stated.

soundness_flags.label: Theorem 2
soundness_flags.one_line: The theorem says the exhibit is in Section 7 and gives a nondegenerate four-cluster design, but Section 7 is assumptions and Exhibit 9.1 contains only substituted coordinates, not the design/table that realizes them.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Replace Assumption sm with a derived lemma: display the full 4x4 X and Y/tau table, compute M, M_-2, beta, h_2, ell_2, s_2, J_2, and beta_-2 directly from the table, then rerun the SC10 transcript from those primitives.

Restate Conjecture 1 as a non-tautological observable formula for the deletion-refit update against MacKinnon-Nielsen-Webb leverage/influence objects, with J_g independently characterized rather than defined by the sign-flip equation.

For Conjecture 3, give location-level anchors to the exact BJS, Callaway-Sant'Anna, and Sun-Abraham estimands and prove or conjecture a sharp condition under which their target weights remain invariant after the same deletion.

recommended_next_step: Reject this version; only revive the angle after deriving the LOCO coordinates from an explicit finite panel table rather than assuming the deletion frontier.
